_doc: Alias-gap negative control. Expected memories link to `nga-nguyen` via ABOUT edges but DO NOT name her in their summary text, so the only retrieval bridge from a query like 'who is chị' is alias → entity → memories. With aliases=[] on nga-nguyen, that bridge is broken. If this case hits, either the harness is wrong or something else is surfacing the memories.

memories.summary: Dinner at the riverside bistro; heard about the new role in fintech.
Heard there's an open junior data analyst seat on that fintech team.
Her birthday is on April 12; prefers oolong tea over coffee.
Finished migrating the analytics dashboard from Redash to Metabase.
Switched the CI runner to GitHub-hosted large runners for faster builds.
Read chapter 3 of Designing Data-Intensive Applications on replication.
Fixed a race condition in the ingest queue that dropped tail records.
Prefers espresso tonic in the afternoon over a second cup of coffee.
Installed Hyprland and spent the weekend porting the Sway keymap.
Wrote a blog draft about why linear types fit the Rust compiler better than GC.
Signed up for a trail running event in May; 14 km with 400 m elevation.
Switched DNS to NextDNS on the router; blocked tracker domains by default.
Read a postmortem on the 2025 Cloudflare outage that wiped API traffic for 40 minutes.
Renewed the apartment lease for another 12 months at the same rent.
Picked up a 1.8 kg kettlebell for hotel-room mornings while travelling.
Compared Pinecone, Qdrant, and Chroma — landed on Chroma for local-first.
Enabled Wayland screen-cast for Hyprland; OBS finally captures the desktop.
Booked a return flight to Hanoi for the long weekend in April.
Kept a running spreadsheet of monthly VND spending; dining is the biggest line.
Wrote a CLI wrapper around ffmpeg for quick audio extraction from screen recordings.
Tried a new dry-hopped lager at the craft brewery across the bridge.
Skimmed a paper on MMR and diversity-aware retrieval; bookmarked for later.
Automated the home-server backup with restic to Backblaze B2.
Debugged a tricky React effect cleanup bug in the portal's auth hook.
Swapped Bose QC headphones for Sony WH-1000XM6 after the latter went on sale.
Read a deep-dive on pip's resolver rewrite for handling conflicting extras.
Finished the Andor season finale; the anti-authoritarian beats landed hard.
